title: Selection Switch +/-
description:
A pulse on input (+) / (-) increases / decreases the value on output (O) by the step size (Sts) in between (Vmin) and (Vmax).
A long-click on (+) / (-) increases / decreases the value on output (O) every (Rr) seconds by step size (Sts).

inputs.description: Increases value on output (O) by step size (Sts).
Decreases value on output (O) by step size (Sts).
Sets a specific value on output (O).
Pulse: Output (O) is reset to the default value (Vdef). On: Block is locked. Dominating input. The name of the connected sensor is used in the user interface.
Disables all inputs when On. (e.g Child lock, cleaning) Control via user interface is still possible.

outputs.description: Intelligent API based connector. API Commands

parameters.description: Remanence input: If active, the function block retains its previous state after a Miniserver reboot. The state of the function block is saved: – When saving to the Miniserver – At a planned reboot – Before a backup – Once per hour The data is saved on the SD card.
Long-click on (+) / (-) increases / decreases the value on output (O) every (Rr) seconds.
Default value when input (Off) is triggered.
